_comment: Corpus-level mean baseline for HTMLTest. This gates the per-corpus SSIM / pixel-diff / RGB-delta MEANS (not per-case pixels, since baselines are Chromium-rendered at run time and are not deterministic per case). A corpus with null means is report-only until seeded. Seed / update ONLY via a trusted run: HTML_EVAL_UPDATE_BASELINE=1 test/run_html_eval.sh. Do not hand-edit the means; you may hand-edit per-corpus tolerance.
